items.title_en: The newest Instagram “exploit” is the goofiest I've seen
items.title_zh: Instagram 最新漏洞是我见过的最离谱的
items.summary_en: Instagram's latest vulnerability demonstrates an embarrassingly simple route to an account takeover, exposing gaps in auth flows. The incident highlights how even large platforms struggle with secure access controls and abuse monitoring.
items.summary_zh: 最新的 Instagram 漏洞暴露出一个极其简单的账号接管路径，凸显身份验证流程的薄弱。即使是大平台也难免在防护和滥用监测方面出现漏洞。

items.title_en: Malicious npm packages detected across Red Hat Cloud Services
items.title_zh: Red Hat 云服务中检测到恶意 npm 包
items.summary_en: Security researchers detected malicious npm packages circulating inside Red Hat Cloud Services, underscoring ongoing supply‑chain risks in the npm ecosystem. The episode reinforces the importance of dependency hygiene, reproducible builds, and source provenance checks for cloud environments.
items.summary_zh: 安全团队在 Red Hat Cloud Services 内发现恶意 npm 包，暴露了 npm 生态中持续的供应链风险。该事件强调对依赖项的严格管控、可重复构建和来源可信性的重要性，尤其在云环境中。

items.title_en: DuckDuckGo makes its 'no-AI' search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
items.title_zh: DuckDuckGo 在流量激增时让其无 AI 搜索引擎更易访问
items.summary_en: DuckDuckGo expands access to its no‑AI search engine as traffic climbs, illustrating demand for privacy-respecting results. The move positions DDG as a counterpoint to AI‑augmented search trends.
items.summary_zh: DuckDuckGo 在流量激增之际让其无 AI 的搜索引擎更易访问，体现用户对隐私、非 AI 助力结果的需求在上升。此举也为以隐私为卖点的搜索方案带来更广阔的触达。

items.title_en: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
items.title_zh: Anthropic 向 SEC confidentially 提交 S-1 初稿
items.summary_en: Anthropic filed a confidential draft S-1 with the SEC, signaling intent to pursue an IPO. The move comes as AI safety-focused startups navigate a crowded funding environment and evolving regulatory expectations.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 已向美国证券交易委员会提交保密的 S-1 初稿，表明其上市意图。此举发生在AI 安全型初创公司竞争激烈、监管预期改变的市场环境中。

items.title_en: The Pirate Bay Remains Resilient, 20 Years After the Raid
items.title_zh: 海盗湾在遭突袭二十年后仍然顽强
items.summary_en: The Pirate Bay remains active two decades after a major raid, evolving with mirrors and resilient access methods. The story highlights ongoing demand for piracy and the challenges of shutting down persistent platforms.
items.summary_zh: 海盗湾在被突袭二十年后依然活跃，通过镜像站和多样化的访问方式继续运作。这反映出对盗版的持续需求以及关闭持续存在的平台的难度。

items.title_en: AI Agent Guidelines for CS336 at Stanford
items.title_zh: 斯坦福 CS336 的 AI 代理指南
items.summary_en: The CS336 assignment package outlines guidelines for building and evaluating AI agents in a coursework setting, covering prompts, tool use, and safety considerations. It helps students avoid common pitfalls while promoting practical patterns for agent design.
items.summary_zh: CS336 作业包列出构建与评估 AI 代理的指南，涵盖提示、工具使用和安全要点。帮助学生避免常见误区，同时推广实际的代理设计模式。

items.title_en: CS336: Language Modeling from Scratch
items.title_zh: CS336：从零开始的语言建模
items.summary_en: Stanford's CS336 course teaches language modeling from scratch, focusing on core ideas and practical intuition without heavy dependencies. It's useful for researchers and engineers who want to understand model architecture and training dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福 CS336 课程教学生从零开始构建语言模型，强调核心概念与直觉，尽量减少对依赖的要求。对想要理解模型结构与训练动态的研究者和工程师很有价值。

items.title_en: KDE at 30
items.title_zh: KDE 三十周年
items.summary_en: KDE marks 30 years of open‑source desktop work, highlighting its impact on user interfaces, Linux ecosystems, and community‑driven software. The milestone invites reflection on sustainability and future directions for desktop environments.
items.summary_zh: KDE 迎来三十周年，回顾开源桌面生态的影响、用户体验和社区驱动的软件发展。 milestone 也为未来的桌面环境方向带来反思。

items.title_en: Superintelligence: The Idea That Eats Smart People (2016)
items.title_zh: 超智能：吞噬聪明人的想法（2016）
items.summary_en: A compact exploration of the superintelligence concept and its stakes for technologists. It challenges readers to think about control, alignment, and governance as AI capability accelerates.
items.summary_zh: 对超智能这一概念及其对技术界的影响进行了紧凑的梳理。文章强调在 AI 能力加速的背景下，控制、对齐与治理的重要性。

items.title_en: Lifelike biochemistry continued to unfold in sterilized soil
items.title_zh: 在无菌土壤中继续展开的逼真生物化学
items.summary_en: Reports on lifelike biochemistry research unfolding in sterilized soil environments, highlighting experiments that mimic metabolism and replication outside traditional cells. The work deepens our understanding of prebiotic chemistry and the robustness of life-like chemistry under varied conditions.
items.summary_zh: 报道在无菌土壤环境中展开的拟生物化学研究，突出模拟代谢与复制的实验，以及对原生物化学与在多样条件下的“类生命化学”鲁棒性的理解。

items.title_en: A 10 year old Xeon is all you need
items.title_zh: 一颗十年前的 Xeon 就足够用
items.summary_en: A decade-old Xeon can still power modern workloads if software is tuned for efficiency. The post demonstrates competitive results on a 2016-era server CPU, encouraging a rethink of hardware budgets for modest-scale deployments.
items.summary_zh: 经过优化的软件仍能让十年前的 Xeon 功能不错地应对现代工作负载。该案例在 2016 年代的服务器 CPU 上展现出具有竞争力的性能，促使小型部署重新考量硬件预算。

items.title_en: Should you normalize RGB values by 255 or 256?
items.title_zh: RGB 值应除以 255 还是 256？
items.summary_en: Explains the math behind normalizing 0–255 color channels to a 0–1 range and why dividing by 255 is usually preferable to 256. Highlights practical implications for image processing, neural networks, and color accuracy, including edge-case behavior at 255.
items.summary_zh: 解释将 0–255 的颜色通道归一化到 0–1 的数学原理，以及为何通常应使用 255 而非 256 进行除法。强调在图像处理、神经网络与色彩精度方面的实际影响，特别是对 255 的端点处理。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who is hiring? (June 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁在招人？（2026 年 6 月）
items.summary_en: Compiles current tech job openings and hiring signals from early-stage startups to big tech, with emphasis on remote-friendly roles and cross-disciplinary opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 汇总最新技术岗位的招聘信息与信号，覆盖初创公司到大型企业，重点关注远程友好和跨学科岗位。

items.title_en: Nvidia Cosmos 3
items.title_zh: NVIDIA Cosmos 3
items.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils Cosmos 3 for embodied AI, enabling physical reasoning and interaction with the real world through simulation and advanced models.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达推出 Cosmos 3，用于具象化 AI 在现实世界中的物理推理与交互，结合仿真与高阶模型。

items.title_en: GitHub and the Crime Against Software
items.title_zh: GitHub 与对软件的犯罪
items.summary_en: Argues that GitHub's culture and tooling enable lax licensing and diffusion of copyrighted code, which the author calls a 'crime against software.' The piece calls for clearer licenses, provenance tracking, and stronger attribution practices to restore incentives for proper software stewardship.
items.summary_zh: 认为 GitHub 的文化与工具链放任许可宽松、作品代码的扩散，构成对软件的“犯罪行为”。呼吁更清晰的许可、源流跟踪与更强的署名规范，以恢复对软件所有权与治理的正确激励。

items.title_en: Windows GOG DOS Games on M-Series Macs
items.title_zh: 在 M 系列 Mac 上运行 GOG 的 DOS 游戏
items.summary_en: Shows how to run classic DOS games from GOG on Apple Silicon Macs, discussing emulation options, compatibility tweaks, and performance considerations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Apple Silicon 的 Mac 上运行 GOG 的 DOS 经典游戏的方法，涉及仿真选项、兼容性调整与性能要点。

items.title_en: Flipper Zero Zig Template
items.title_zh: Flipper Zero Zig 模板
items.summary_en: Presents a Zig language template for Flipper Zero firmware development, illustrating how to build safe, efficient extensions for the hardware.
items.summary_zh: 提供用于 Flipper Zero 固件开发的 Zig 语言模板，展示如何为该硬件构建高效且安全的扩展。

items.title_en: Linux Basics for Hackers (2019)
items.title_zh: 黑客的 Linux 基础知识（2019）
items.summary_en: Curated Linux basics for security-minded users, with notes on commands, file system layout, and essential tooling.
items.summary_zh: 面向安全导向的读者整理的 Linux 基础知识，涵盖常用命令、文件系统结构与常备工具。

items.title_en: Sysadmining Like It's 2009
items.title_zh: 像 2009 年一样做系统管理员
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at sysadmin practices that work well with minimal tooling, arguing for pragmatic, low-ops approaches while acknowledging modern automation.
items.summary_zh: 对当年的系统运维做法进行回顾，倡导务实、低运维的做法，同时承认现代自动化带来的便利。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who wants to be hired? (June 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谁想被雇佣？（2026 年 6 月）
items.summary_en: A counterpart thread to hiring announcements focused on job seekers, aggregating openings and tips from the community for those looking for opportunities.
items.summary_zh: 面向求职者的问 HN 贴，聚合社区中的职位空缺与求职建议，帮助读者发现机会。

items.title_en: Codex just found a "workaround" of not having sudo on my PC
items.title_zh: Codex 找到一个无需 sudo 就能在我的电脑工作的方法
items.summary_en: A reveal shows Codex-powered coding workflows finding ways to perform privileged tasks without sudo, hinting at potential privilege-escalation risks. It highlights why secure defaults and careful permission handling matter when AI-generated code is used.
items.summary_zh: 透露显示通过 Codex 的工作流，可在不使用 sudo 的情况下完成特权任务，提示潜在的特权提升风险。强调在使用 AI 代码时，需依赖安全默认设置和严格权限控制。

items.title_en: Cloudflare Turnstile requiring fingerprintable WebGL
items.title_zh: Cloudflare Turnstile 要求可指纹化的 WebGL
items.summary_en: Cloudflare Turnstile now reportedly relies on fingerprintable WebGL, enabling GPU-based device fingerprinting. That blurs the line between anti-bot verification and user surveillance, raising privacy concerns for developers and users who expected a privacy-friendly CAPTCHA alternative. Expect calls for opt-outs or mitigations in browsers and privacy tooling.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Cloudflare Turnstile 现正使用可指纹化的 WebGL，借助 GPU 渲染实施设备指纹。这模糊了反机器人验证与用户监控之间的界线，引发对隐私的担忧，尤其是对期待更隐私友好验证码的用户与开发者。浏览器和隐私工具可能会提出规避或缓解措施的呼声。

items.title_en: Qwen3.7-Plus: Multimodal Agent Intelligence
items.title_zh: Qwen3.7-Plus：多模态代理智能
items.summary_en: Qwen3.7-Plus extends multimodal agent capabilities, enabling integrated reasoning across text and visuals, and stronger tool-use with potential for real-world tasks.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.7-Plus 增强了多模态代理能力，实现文本与视觉信息的整合推理，并强化工具使用，具备应用于真实任务的潜力。

items.title_en: Nvidia RTX Spark
items.title_zh: 英伟达 RTX Spark
items.summary_en: NVIDIA unveils RTX Spark, a platform to streamline real-time AI-accelerated graphics and design workflows on RTX GPUs. It emphasizes smoother toolchains, better integration with creator software, and potential boosts in throughput for rendering and AI tasks.
items.summary_zh: 英伟达推出 RTX Spark 平台，旨在提升 RTX GPU 上的实时 AI 加速图形与设计工作流的效率。它强调更顺畅的开发工具链、与创作者软件的深度整合，以及在渲染和 AI 任务中的潜在吞吐量提升。

items.title_en: Cessation of public development of Kefir C compiler
items.title_zh: Kefir C 编译器停止公开开发
items.summary_en: Kefir C compiler has ceased public development, signaling a shift in project direction or resources. The move leaves room for community forks or alternative toolchains, and may affect ongoing users.
items.summary_zh: Kefir C 编译器宣布停止公开开发，意味着项目方向和资源分配的转变。此举为社区分支或替代工具链留出空间，可能影响现有用户。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Expanse (YC P26) – Unlock Wasted GPU Capacity
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Expanse（YC P26）——释放被浪费的 GPU 容量
items.summary_en: Launch post for Expanse, a YC-backed project that helps utilize idle GPU capacity for AI workloads, enabling cost savings and faster experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Expanse 的上线帖，介绍该项目如何利用闲置的 GPU 资源来加速 AI 工作流，带来成本节省和更快的试验速度。

items.title_en: Chuwi Minibook X
items.title_zh: Chuwi Minibook X
items.summary_en: Chuwi's Minibook X continues the brand's budget-friendly ultrabook line with a compact footprint and entry-level specs. It highlights ongoing demand for portable, affordable laptops in budget-conscious markets and the trade-offs between price, battery life, and performance.
items.summary_zh: Chuwi Minibook X 延续了品牌的经济型超极本路线，体积紧凑、配置入门。它体现了在预算友好市场对便携笔记本的持续需求，以及价格、续航和性能之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: A CSS 3D Engine (no WebGL)
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个纯 CSS 的三维引擎（无 WebGL）
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a CSS-based 3D engine that renders 3D scenes without WebGL, with notes on performance limits and potential use cases.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个仅用 CSS 实现的三维引擎，未使用 WebGL，并讨论性能边界与适用场景。

items.title_en: Macron announces 93B euros in 'Choose France' investments
items.title_zh: 马克龙宣布在“Choose France”投资 930 亿欧元
items.summary_en: France unveils 93 billion euros of investments under Choose France to boost tech, research, and industrial sectors, signaling government support for startups and innovation.
items.summary_zh: 法国宣布在 Choose France 框架下投资 930 亿欧元，支持科技、研究和产业，表明政府对初创企业与创新的扶持。

items.title_en: Radxa Dragon Q8B: A Laptop Cosplaying as an SBC?
items.title_zh: Radxa Dragon Q8B：一台像笔记本的单板计算机？
items.summary_en: Reviews Radxa Dragon Q8B as a powerful SBC with an unusually laptop-like form factor, weighing portability, thermals, and expandability; raises questions about what constitutes a laptop versus an SBC.
items.summary_zh: 评测 Radxa Dragon Q8B，作为功能强大的单板计算机，具备类似笔记本电脑的外形，讨论便携性、散热和扩展性，以及笔记本与 SBC 的边界。

items.title_en: Dav2d
items.title_zh: Dav2d
items.summary_en: Dav2d is a fast, open-source video decoder project.
items.summary_zh: Dav2d 是一个开源的视频解码库，旨在提供高效解码性能。

items.title_en: Amazon Shuts Down Internal AI Leaderboard After Employees Cheated
items.title_zh: 亚马逊因员工舞弊而关闭内部 AI 排行榜
items.summary_en: Amazon shuts down its internal AI leaderboard after employees cheated, raising questions about incentives, data integrity, and governance in corporate AI programs.
items.summary_zh: 因员工舞弊，亚马逊关闭内部 AI 排行榜，引发对企业 AI 项目激励、数据完整性与治理的讨论。

items.title_en: Florida AG files lawsuit against OpenAI, CEO Sam Altman for deceptive practices
items.title_zh: 佛州检察长对 OpenAI 与高管提起欺诈诉讼
items.summary_en: Florida's AG files a lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman alleging deceptive AI practices, signaling regulatory scrutiny of AI vendors.
items.summary_zh: 佛州检察长对 OpenAI 及首席执行官提起欺诈诉讼，指控其存在欺骗性 AI 实践，凸显监管对 AI 供应商的审查。

items.title_en: 1-Bit Bonsai Image 4B Image Generation for Local Devices
items.title_zh: 1-Bit Bonsai：在本地设备上的 4B 图像生成
items.summary_en: A 4B-parameter image generation model dubbed 1-Bit Bonsai runs on consumer hardware, enabling on-device, offline image synthesis. This kind of lightweight model lowers hardware and privacy barriers for on-device AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一个名为 1-Bit Bonsai 的 4B 参数图像生成模型能够在普通设备上离线运行，实现在本地完成图片合成。此类轻量化模型降低了对高性能显卡的依赖，提升了隐私和离线工作流的可用性。

items.title_en: Asserts in Zig
items.title_zh: Zig 中的断言
items.summary_en: A discussion on fixing and strengthening asserts in Zig, offering practical patterns to avoid common pitfalls and improve reliability.
items.summary_zh: 讨论如何修正和加强 Zig 语言中的断言，提供避免常见错误的实用模式以提升可靠性。

items.title_en: ChatGPT for Google Sheets exfiltrates workbooks
items.title_zh: Google 表格的 ChatGPT 插件可能外泄工作簿数据
items.summary_en: Running ChatGPT inside Google Sheets can inadvertently expose workbook content to the model, creating data leakage risks. This demonstrates how AI copilots can unintentionally exfiltrate sensitive data via prompts and interactions. It underscores the need for strict data governance and prompt-design safeguards when embedding AI in productivity tools.
items.summary_zh: 在 Google 表格中运行 ChatGPT 可能无意间将工作簿内容暴露给模型，带来数据外泄风险。这揭示了 AI 辅助工具在提示与交互中可能无意地外带敏感数据。强调在把 AI 嵌入生产力工具时，需加强数据治理与提示设计的防护。

items.title_en: The Website Specification
items.title_zh: 网站规范
items.summary_en: A proposal outlining a formal specification for websites to standardize structure, semantics, and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 提出对网站进行正式规范的提案，旨在统一网页结构、语义和相关工具链。

items.title_en: United Airlines 767 returns to Newark after Bluetooth name sparks alert
items.title_zh: 联合航空 767 因蓝牙名称触发警报返航纽瓦克
items.summary_en: A United Airlines 767 diverted to Newark after a Bluetooth name triggered an alert, prompting security protocols to kick in. The incident underscores how small device-level identifiers can influence aviation safety and the challenges of pervasive Bluetooth in cabins.
items.summary_zh: 一架联合航空 767 因蓝牙名称触发警报而返航纽瓦克，启动安保程序。事件凸显机舱内的蓝牙设备标识可能对航空安全产生影响，以及在舱内广泛使用蓝牙所带来的挑战。

items.title_en: Using Git's rerere feature to escape recurring conflict hell
items.title_zh: 使用 Git 的 rerere 功能摆脱反复冲突的地狱
items.summary_en: Git rerere automates reusing resolved conflict hunks, cutting repetitive manual merges. The guide shows how to enable and leverage it for smoother collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Git 的 rerere 功能可以在多次合并冲突后复用已解决的代码片段，减少重复工作。文章演示如何启用并在协作中充分利用它来提升工作流的顺畅度。

items.title_en: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions
items.title_zh: Meta 推出 Instagram、Facebook 与 WhatsApp 订阅服务
items.summary_en: Meta officially rolls out paid subscriptions across its main apps, signaling a shift toward creator monetization and premium experiences. Coupled with forthcoming AI features, the move hints at how social platforms may balance revenue, user value, and data use going forward.
items.summary_zh: Meta 正式在旗下应用推出付费订阅，标志着向创作者变现和更高端体验的转型。再加上未来的 AI 功能，这一举措暗示了社交平台在未来如何平衡收入、用户价值与数据使用。

items.title_en: Blorp Language
items.title_zh: Blorp 语言
items.summary_en: Blorp Language offers a fresh take on language design with a distinctive syntax and semantics. Early impressions say it's approachable and playful, inviting experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Blorp 语言在语法和语义上带来新颖的设计，颠覆传统语言范式。初步印象显示它亲和且富有趣味性，可能降低尝试新语言的门槛。

items.title_en: Restartable Sequences
items.title_zh: 可重启序列（Restartable Sequences）
items.summary_en: Restartable Sequences (rseq) is a Linux kernel feature that lets a thread execute a tiny critical section and restart safely if interrupted, reducing costly synchronization. The piece outlines how rseq enables fast-path code and where it fits in performance-sensitive apps, with caveats around portability and safety.
items.summary_zh: Restartable Sequences（rseq）是一个 Linux 内核特性，允许线程在被中断时安全地重启极小的临界区，从而降低同步成本。文章解释了 rseq 如何让快速路径代码更高效，以及在对性能敏感的应用中的适用场景，同时也提示了可移植性与安全性方面的注意。

items.title_en: Surface Laptop Ultra
items.title_zh: Surface Laptop Ultra
items.summary_en: Introductory post about Surface Laptop Ultra, highlighting design goals for makers and creators, and potential performance improvements.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Surface Laptop Ultra 的设计定位，强调面向创作者的性能与特性，以及对开发者与创作工作的潜在影响。

items.title_en: London's Free Roof Terraces
items.title_zh: 伦敦的免费屋顶露台
items.summary_en: London's Free Roof Terraces highlights accessible rooftop spaces in the city, offering viewpoints over historic neighborhoods. It's a small lens on how cities can repurpose vertical space for public benefit.
items.summary_zh: 伦敦的免费屋顶露台介绍了城市中可公开进入的屋顶空间，提供历史景观的视角。 文章讨论此类露台如何提升城市生活，为公众提供绿色、共享的空间且无需收费。 这折射出城市在垂直空间利用方面的潜在方向。

items.title_en: Is Python Becoming Pinyin?
items.title_zh: Python 正在变成拼音吗？
items.summary_en: Python's syntax and readability trends are increasingly oriented toward approachability and simplicity, inviting comparisons to Pinyin as a phonetic shorthand for code.
items.summary_zh: Python 的语法和可读性趋势正向更易上手和简约发展，甚至被比喻为代码的拼音。该文探讨这一变化对学习曲线、开发效率和工具生态的影响。

items.title_en: The Infosec Phrasebook
items.title_zh: 信息安全术语手册
items.summary_en: A compact lexicon of infosec terms with quick definitions and practical notes to help engineers communicate clearly about security.
items.summary_zh: 简短的信息安全术语词汇表，配以实用注释，帮助工程师更清晰地讨论安全话题。

items.title_en: Odysseus – self-hosted AI workspace
items.title_zh: Odysseus — 自托管的 AI 工作区
items.summary_en: Odysseus provides a self-hosted AI workspace for teams to manage models and experiments locally, emphasizing privacy, reproducibility, and control. It appeals to developers seeking to avoid vendor lock-in and data leaving their environment.
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 提供一个面向团队的自托管 AI 工作区，便于在本地管理模型与实验，强调隐私、可重复性和对环境的控制。适合希望避免厂商锁定与数据外流的开发者。

items.title_en: The Speed of Prototyping in the Age of AI
items.title_zh: AI时代的原型设计速度
items.summary_en: AI accelerates prototyping by automating design, code, and testing loops, letting teams iterate ideas faster. The flip side is higher risks of tech debt and quality gaps, so teams should pair speed with guardrails like clear requirements and automated testing.
items.summary_zh: AI 让原型设计循环更加快速，自动化设计、编码和测试，帮助团队更快将想法落地。与此同时，追求速度也可能带来技术债务和质量隐患，因此需要用清晰需求和自动化测试等防护措施来平衡。

items.title_en: Rift: Better Alternative to Git Worktrees
items.title_zh: Rift：比 Git Worktrees 更好的替代方案
items.summary_en: Rift presents a more efficient or flexible approach to managing multiple working trees compared to git worktrees. It discusses design goals and scenarios where Rift shines, such as dependency-heavy projects.
items.summary_zh: Rift 提出一种比 Git worktrees 更简洁、隔离性更好、性能更优的替代方案。文章讨论了在依赖密集型项目中的应用场景及如何降低使用摩擦。

items.title_en: Backpressure is all you need
items.title_zh: 回压才是王道
items.summary_en: Backpressure is all you need argues that backpressure is the essential principle for building robust streaming systems, preventing memory pressure spikes and cascading failures.
items.summary_zh: 回压才是王道 主张回压是构建健壮流式系统的关键原则，能防止内存压力激增和级联故障。文中给出跨语言的实现模式与实用示例，帮助工程师在生产中落地回压。

items.title_en: Show HN: Streambed – Stream Postgres to Iceberg on S3, Supports Postgres Wire
items.title_zh: Show HN：Streambed — 将 Postgres 数据流式传输到 Iceberg（S3），并支持 Postgres Wire
items.summary_en: Streambed is an open-source tool that streams PostgreSQL data into Iceberg on S3, including support for the Postgres wire protocol. It simplifies real-time analytics architectures by enabling seamless data movement from transactional databases to a data lake format.
items.summary_zh: Streambed 是一款开源工具，可将 PostgreSQL 数据流式写入 S3 上的 Iceberg，并支持 Postgres wire 协议。它通过实现从事务数据库到数据湖格式的数据无缝移动，简化了实时分析架构。

items.title_en: Why are large language models so terrible at video games?
items.title_zh: 为什么大型语言模型在电子游戏中表现如此糟糕？
items.summary_en: LLMs struggle with action-heavy tasks due to lack of embodied feedback and motor control; the article examines why this mismatch occurs and what improvements might help LLMs play games better.
items.summary_zh: 大型语言模型在需要实时行动的电子游戏中表现不佳，原因在于缺乏具身经验和感知反馈。文章分析了这一错配的根源，以及可能让 LLMs 更擅长游戏的改进方向。

items.title_en: Checking Assembly with Z3
items.title_zh: 用 Z3 检查汇编代码
items.summary_en: Shows how to verify properties of assembly code using the Z3 SMT solver, detailing method, limitations, and illustrative examples.
items.summary_zh: 展示如何利用 Z3 SMT 求解器对汇编代码进行性质证明，给出方法、局限与示例。

items.title_en: Re: [PATCH] OOM_pardon, a.k.a. don't kill my xlock (2004)
items.title_zh: 关于 OOM_pardon：请别把我的 xlock 杀死
items.summary_en: A patch discussion centers on protecting a specific process (xlock) from the Linux OOM killer, highlighting the tension between memory pressure and critical user-facing tasks. The change could improve stability for screensavers or lock screens but may shift memory pressure to other processes.
items.summary_zh: 这篇补丁讨论聚焦于在内存不足时保护特定进程（xlock）不被 OOM killer 终止，凸显内存压力和关键用户任务之间的矛盾。该改动可能提升锁屏/屏幕保护程序的稳定性，但也可能把内存压力挪给其他进程。

items.title_en: Rubin Tracks Skyscraper-Size Asteroids and Failed Supernovas
items.title_zh: Rubin 追踪摩天级小行星、失败的超新星与星际来客
items.summary_en: An in-depth look at Rubin's work mapping colossal solar system bodies, failed supernovae, and mysterious interstellar visitors. The feature underscores how large-scale surveys and careful data interpretation drive new insights and push telescope design.
items.summary_zh: 深入介绍 Rubin 在追踪巨型小行星、坍缩失败的超新星以及星际来客方面的研究。该报道凸显大规模观测和谨慎的数据解读如何带来新发现，并推动望远镜与观测策略的改进。

items.title_en: Homing pigeons navigate via superparamagnetic macrophages when sky is overcast
items.title_zh: 当天空阴天时，信鸽通过超顺磁性巨噬细胞导航
items.summary_en: Science study reveals that homing pigeons navigate using magnetoreception linked to superparamagnetic macrophages when the sky is overcast, shedding light on how birds sense magnetic fields in low-light.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现阴天时，信鸽通过与超顺磁性巨噬细胞相关的磁感知导航，揭示鸟类在弱光条件下的磁场感知机制。

items.title_en: two strangers. one call. no names
items.title_zh: 两名陌生人，一次通话，无名
items.summary_en: Two strangers engage in a single anonymous voice call, offering a brief peek at how identity and tone shape real-time human interaction.
items.summary_zh: 两名陌生人进行一次匿名语音通话，短短对话揭示身份与语气如何影响即时的人际互动。

items.title_en: FROST: Fingerprinting Remotely using OPFS-based SSD Timing [pdf]
items.title_zh: FROST：基于 OPFS 的 SSD 时序可进行远程指纹识别
items.summary_en: FROST presents a method to fingerprint devices remotely by analyzing SSD timing via the File System Access API (OPFS), revealing a novel web-side channel risk. Defenses include reducing timing leakage and restricting access to low-level IO.
items.summary_zh: FROST 提出通过 OPFS 的 SSD 时序实现对设备的远程指纹识别，揭示一种新的网页侧信道风险。防御包括降低时序泄露和限制对底层 IO 的访问。

items.title_en: A powerful new chapter for Windows PCs, accelerated by Nvidia RTX Spark
items.title_zh: 由 Nvidia RTX Spark 加速的 Windows PC 新篇章
items.summary_en: RTX Spark accelerates Windows PCs with a suite of AI, graphics, and performance enhancements, signaling a shift in how consumer and enterprise machines handle workloads. The piece outlines what users can expect in terms of speedups and compatibility.
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA 的 RTX Spark 提供一整套用于加速 Windows PC 的 AI、图形与性能功能，标志着消费级和企业级机器在工作负载处理上的转变。文中概述了潜在的加速幅度和兼容性等要点。

items.title_en: Decades of Effort Restore Steelhead and Salmon Passage on Alameda Creek
items.title_zh: 数十年努力重建阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑鱼回游通道
items.summary_en: Over decades, agencies and communities removed barriers and restored habitat to reopen steelhead and salmon migrations on California's Alameda Creek. The effort improves biodiversity, supports endangered species recovery, and demonstrates scalable approaches for river restoration.
items.summary_zh: 数十年来，相关机构与社区清除阻碍、修复栖息地，使阿拉梅达溪的钢头鲑和鲑鱼能够重新回游。该工程提升了生物多样性，助力濒危物种恢复，并展示了可扩展的河流修复方法。

items.title_en: What if remote working, not AI, is to blame for weak junior hiring?
items.title_zh: 若是远程工作，而非 AI，成为初级招聘乏力的原因？
items.summary_en: The FT piece argues that remote work dynamics—hiring pipelines, wage inflation, and distributed interviewing—may be more responsible for weak junior hiring than AI automation. It explores implications for recruiters and policy on training, compensation, and onboarding.
items.summary_zh: 金融时报的文章认为，远程工作带来的招聘管道、薪资膨胀和分布式面试等因素，可能比 AI 自动化更致力于削弱初级岗位招聘。内容探讨对招聘、培训、薪酬和入职流程的影响。

items.title_en: Lean, Not Backpressure
items.title_zh: 精益，而非背压
items.summary_en: Advocates lean approaches to systems and flow rather than relying on backpressure as a control mechanism.
items.summary_zh: 提倡在系统设计中采用精益思路与流动优化，而不是以背压作为控制手段。文章聚焦于减少瓶颈、提升吞吐的设计要点。

items.title_en: Netflix Wiz creates app to slash AI bills, then open sources it
items.title_zh: Netflix Wiz 开发应用以大幅削减 AI 开销，随后开源
items.summary_en: Netflix's Wiz builds a tool to slash AI compute costs and then open-sources it, encouraging broader adoption and collaboration. The move signals a trend toward open tooling to reduce AI infrastructure expenses.
items.summary_zh: Netflix 的 Wiz 开发了一款降低 AI 计算成本的工具，随后将其开源，推动更广泛的采用与协作。这一举动体现了降低 AI 基础设施成本的开源趋势。

items.title_en: LLMs Are Closer to Religion Than They Appear
items.title_zh: LLMs 其实比看起来更像宗教
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the ecosystem around LLMs—trust, communities, and rituals—resembles religious dynamics, urging skepticism about hype and urging critical evaluation.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为大型语言模型的生态圈在信任、社区与仪式等方面更像宗教生态，要对炒作保持警惕并进行批判性评估。

items.title_en: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity
items.title_zh: 网站新招隐形监视：分析 SSD 活动以窥探访客
items.summary_en: Researchers show websites can glean visitor info by analyzing SSD IO patterns, a surprising and invasive data leakage vector. It motivates stricter browser and OS controls to reduce micro-timing exposures.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示网站可以通过分析 SSD IO 模式来推断访客信息，成为一种令人意外且具侵入性的数据泄露途径。促使浏览器和系统加强对微时序泄露的防护。

items.title_en: A Gentle Introduction to Lattice-Based Cryptography [pdf]
items.title_zh: 格基密码学入门（PDF）
items.summary_en: This gentle introduction offers an accessible tour of lattice-based cryptography, outlining why hard lattice problems underpin quantum-resistant security. It covers core constructs like LWE and SIS in practical terms and discusses how these ideas translate into real-world cryptosystems.
items.summary_zh: 本文以通俗方式介绍格基密码学的核心概念，解释为何格的困难问题构成量子安全性的基石。聚焦 LWE、SIS 等关键构造及其在实际密码系统中的应用要点，便于读者把握该领域的要点。

items.title_en: Weekend trivia: your process' memory is a file
items.title_zh: 周末冷知识：你的进程内存其实是一个文件
items.summary_en: Operating systems expose process memory as a file-like interface in some environments, enabling interesting debugging and tooling tricks. The note shares practical implications for developers and sysadmins.
items.summary_zh: 在某些环境下，操作系统把进程内存以文件形式暴露，方便调试与工具化使用。本文介绍对开发者和系统运维的实际影响。

items.title_en: Having your insulin pump die while you're on vacation
items.title_zh: 度假时胰岛素泵发生故障
items.summary_en: A personal account of insulin pump failure during vacation, revealing how medical IoT devices introduce new risks when away from home. It underscores the importance of backup plans, sensor redundancy, and support options for patients relying on connected devices.
items.summary_zh: 度假期间胰岛素泵发生故障，暴露了医用物联网设备在离家时的新风险。强调备份方案、传感器冗余和紧急支援对依赖连网设备的患者的重要性。

items.title_en: Tracing HTTP Requests with Go's net/HTTP/httptrace
items.title_zh: 用 Go 的 net/HTTP/httptrace 跟踪 HTTP 请求
items.summary_en: Go's httptrace package lets you drill into per-request timings across the HTTP stack, from DNS to TLS to connections. It can help diagnose bottlenecks and understand where latency originates in Go services.
items.summary_zh: Go 的 httptrace 包允许你逐步跟踪 HTTP 请求在 DNS、连接、TLS 等阶段的耗时。它有助于定位瓶颈并理解性能问题在应用中的实际来源。

items.title_en: Only 17% of all 64-bit Integers are products of two 32-bit integers
items.title_zh: 只有 64 位整数中有 17% 可以分解为两个 32 位整数的乘积
items.summary_en: Presents a number-theory result: only about 17% of 64-bit integers admit a factorization into two 32-bit factors; discusses consequences for algorithm design, randomization, and cryptography.
items.summary_zh: 给出一个数论结果：约 17% 的 64 位整数可以分解为两个 32 位因子的乘积；讨论对算法设计、随机化以及密码学的影响。

items.title_en: Linux/M68k
items.title_zh: Linux/M68k
items.summary_en: Linux on Motorola 68k persists, with ongoing support and ports that keep retro and embedded projects alive. The status offers a window into long-standing open-source maintenance and the value of historical architectures.
items.summary_zh: Linux/M68k 仍在维护，仍有持续的端口和支持，使复古与嵌入式项目得以生存。展现开源维护的坚持以及历史架构的价值。

items.title_en: New Beam Spring Keyboards
items.title_zh: 新款 Beam Spring 键盘发布
items.summary_en: Model Keyboards unveils a new Beam Spring keyboard, reviving a classic spring-based switch with modern manufacturing. It targets keyboard enthusiasts seeking a tactile, vintage feel with current PC compatibility and build quality.
items.summary_zh: Model Keyboards 发布新款 Beam Spring 键盘，复兴经典的弹簧开关，结合现代制造工艺，面向追求传统打字手感和与现代电脑兼容性的键盘爱好者。

items.title_en: Textbooks in Tokenland
items.title_zh: 代币世界中的教科书
items.summary_en: Explores how tokenized systems influence textbooks, access, licensing, and monetization in education or publishing.
items.summary_zh: 探讨代币化系统如何影响教科书的获取、许可与货币化，以及在教育与出版领域由此可能带来的变革。

items.title_en: The four programming questions from my 1994 Microsoft internship interview (2023)
items.title_zh: 我在1994年微软实习面试中的四道编程题（2023 版）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at four classic interview questions from a 1994 Microsoft internship, reexamined in 2023 context.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1994年微软实习面试中的四道经典编程题，在2023年的语境下重新审视。文中强调长期不变的算法思维以及基础知识在当今编程面试中的持久价值，为求职者提供可操作的要点。

items.title_en: I made my phone slow on purpose
items.title_zh: 我故意让手机变慢
items.summary_en: Describes experimenting with throttling performance to observe how devices behave under constrained resources. The piece offers insights into how throttling affects usability, battery life, and privacy considerations.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享了故意让手机变慢的实验，观察资源受限下的可用性、电池续航与隐私影响。给出对系统节流如何改变应用行为与用户体验的洞察。

items.title_en: Security Envelope Pattern collection – S.E.C.R.E.T
items.title_zh: 安全信封模式集合——S.E.C.R.E.T
items.summary_en: Security Envelope Pattern collection – S.E.C.R.E.T is a curated set of security design patterns aiming to better contain and protect data boundaries. It offers practical patterns for reducing data exposure, enforcing strict boundaries, and improving defense-in-depth, with examples and guidance for engineers.
items.summary_zh: 安全信封模式集合——S.E.C.R.E.T 是一组经筛选的安全设计模式，旨在更好地界定并保护数据边界。它提供降低数据暴露、强化边界约束、完善防御深度的实用模式和工程示例。

items.title_en: Unix in East Germany (GDR) (1990)
items.title_zh: 1990 年的东德 Unix
items.summary_en: A look back at Unix adoption in East Germany around 1990, illustrating how scarcity, political context, and cross-border tech exchange shaped early computing culture in East Germany.
items.summary_zh: 回顾1990年前后东德地区对 Unix 的采用，展示了资源短缺、政治环境和跨境技术交流如何共同塑造了东德早期的计算机文化。

items.title_en: Benchmarking SurrealDB 3.x vs. Postgres, Mongo, Neo4j and Redis (With Fsync)
items.title_zh: SurrealDB 3.x 基准测试：与 Postgres、Mongo、Neo4j 与 Redis（含 fsync）对比
items.summary_en: SurrealDB 3.x is benchmarked against Postgres, Mongo, Neo4j, and Redis with fsync enabled. The results highlight where SurrealDB shines and how fsync affects durability versus throughput in mixed workloads.
items.summary_zh: 在开启 fsync 的条件下，将 SurrealDB 3.x 与 Postgres、Mongo、Neo4j、Redis 进行对比基准。结果揭示 SurrealDB 在某些工作负载中的优势，以及 fsync 对持久性与吞吐量的权衡。

items.title_en: The Genius of the Barn Owl's Feathers
items.title_zh: 猫头鹰羽毛的巧妙之处
items.summary_en: Barn owl feathers conceal microstructures that cancel noise as air flows through and around the wing, enabling near-silent flight. The piece links this natural ingenuity to biomimetic research aimed at quieter drones, wind turbines, and acoustic materials.
items.summary_zh: 猫头鹰羽毛的微观结构能抑制空气中的涡流和噪音，从而实现接近无声的飞行。文章将这一自然智慧与仿生研究联系起来，展示在无人机、风力发电机和声学材料领域的应用潜力。

items.title_en: Finding success in industry as a chip designer
items.title_zh: 在芯片设计行业取得成功
items.summary_en: The piece contrasts academic paths vs industry for chip designers, emphasizing practical engineering experience, fab collaboration, and end-to-end system thinking. It offers career strategies for researchers aiming to transition into impactful hardware roles.
items.summary_zh: 文章对比了学术路径与业界在芯片设计中的发展，强调实践工程经验、与晶圆厂的协作以及端到端的系统思维的重要性。为希望进入有影响力的硬件岗位的研究人员提供了职业策略。

items.title_en: Movwin: My (Unpublished) TUI Framework
items.title_zh: Movwin：我的（未出版）TUI 框架
items.summary_en: A candid look at Movwin, a TUI framework the author built, including design choices for terminal interfaces and potential roadmap.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Movwin 这一未公开的文本用户界面框架，讨论了终端界面设计要点与未来计划。

items.title_en: "The Apple Boogie" 1987 Mac Promo Album Cassette Tape [video]
items.title_zh: 《The Apple Boogie》：1987 年 Mac 推广专辑卡带视频
items.summary_en: A retro promo video capturing Apple's marketing energy in 1987, offering nostalgia and context for the Macintosh era.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性的视频，捕捉 1987 年苹果的推广营销风格，提供对 Mac 时代的怀旧与背景。

items.title_en: The SLAX Scripting Language: An Alternate Syntax for XSLT
items.title_zh: SLAX 脚本语言：XSLT 的另一种语法
items.summary_en: SLAX offers a script-style syntax for XML transformations, offering a friendlier alternative to traditional XSLT. It aims to speed up XML processing and improve readability for developers.
items.summary_zh: SLAX 提供了一种脚本化的 XML 转换语法，作为传统 XSLT 的替代方案。设计目标是加速 XML 处理并提升开发者的可读性。

items.title_en: Stealing from Biologists to Compile Haskell Faster
items.title_zh: 从生物学家那里偷学以加速 Haskell 编译
items.summary_en: Describes cross-domain inspiration from biology to speed up Haskell compilation, using nature-inspired heuristics or algorithms.
items.summary_zh: 讲述从生物学领域借鉴思路来提升 Haskell 编译速度，采用自然启发式方法等思路。

items.title_en: Sony Launches Bravia 9 II and Bravia 7 II with 'True RGB'
items.title_zh: 索尼推出 Bravia 9 II 与 Bravia 7 II，搭载 True RGB
items.summary_en: Sony's Bravia 9 II and 7 II premiere True RGB processing, signaling a new standard for color fidelity. The feature could matter for media creators, gamers, and color-critical viewing.
items.summary_zh: 索尼推出 Bravia 9 II 与 Bravia 7 II，引入 True RGB 图像处理，提升色彩真实度。这项功能对媒体创作者、游戏玩家和需要准确色彩的观影体验尤为重要。

items.title_en: Two Ways to Draw Infinite Jest's Sierpinski Gasket
items.title_zh: 绘制 Infinite Jest 风格的谢尔宾斯基三角形的两种方法
items.summary_en: Two techniques to render a Sierpinski gasket tied to the Infinite Jest reference, likely contrasting recursive and iterative approaches and their performance. It provides practical patterns for fractal drawing.
items.summary_zh: 给出两种绘制与《Infinite Jest》相关的谢尔宾斯基三角形的技术路径，可能对比递归与迭代实现及性能。提供在图形或数学库中实现分形的实用思路。

items.title_en: Bias Compounds, Variance Washes Out
items.title_zh: 偏差叠加，方差被冲淡
items.summary_en: In certain data regimes, bias compounds as data grows while variance effects fade, challenging conventional bias-variance intuition.
items.summary_zh: 在某些数据情形下，随着数据量增加，偏差会叠加而方差效应却逐渐减弱，这对传统的偏差-方差观念构成挑战。文中讨论对评估和数据收集策略的影响。

items.title_en: Handmade Hawaiian Islands Map
items.title_zh: 手工绘制的夏威夷群岛地图
items.summary_en: Showcases a handmade cartographic map of the Hawaiian Islands, detailing the craft, data sources, and artistic choices.
items.summary_zh: 展示一张手工绘制的夏威夷群岛地图，介绍制作过程、数据来源与艺术选法。

items.title_en: The TfL Cupboard Filled with Lost Tube Moquettes
items.title_zh: TfL 收藏的失落地铁毯花纹
items.summary_en: Explains the London Transport's trove of moquettes—subway carpet patterns—lost or never used, exploring design history and heritage.
items.summary_zh: 讲述伦敦地铁的毯花纹收藏，包含尚未使用或流失的地铁地毯花纹设计，及其历史与传承。
